rag_rules: Fix function call argument count to match defined signature in AGREE contracts
Place component type contracts in valid component type scopes with visible identifiers
generic_rules: Use initialized temporal recurrence for stateful equations
Write output dependency guarantees using visible inputs and outputs only
Ensure AGREE type declarations use valid scalar types: int, real, bool
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts must be enclosed in annex agree {** ... **} blocks
Branching logic in AGREE uses nested if-then-else expressions
Component type annexes are for assumptions/guarantees; implementation annexes for bindings
anti_patterns: Do not reference implementation-only subcomponents in component type contracts
Do not use unresolved identifiers or invalid helper declarations in AGREE contracts
irrelevant_topics: type scope range assumption and guarantee
